title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Qualcomm India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Qualcomm India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Qualcomm India Global Group in Mysuru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Qualcomm India Global Group:
Qualcomm India Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Qualcomm India Global Group!
